zh.Yeovil, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特也奧維爾
zh.Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton於1400年5月19日出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯圖頓時，他的父親William Stourton11397歲，母親Elizabeth Moigne28歲。他於大約1430年與Margery Wadham在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1450年登記服兵役。他於1445年被列為treasurer of the household。他去世於1462年11月25日在英國維爾爾斯圖頓享年62歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福。

zh-hans.Yeovil, Somerset, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特也奧維爾
zh-hans.Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England: 英国薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton于1400年5月19日出生在英国英格兰維爾爾斯圖頓时，他的父亲William Stourton11397岁，母亲Elizabeth Moigne28岁。他于大约1430年与Margery Wadham在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1450年登记服兵役。他于1445年被列为treasurer of the household。他去世于1462年11月25日在英国維爾爾斯圖頓享年62岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特查爾頓 姆斯格洛福。

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton was born on 19 May 1400, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Stourton, was 11397 and his mother, Elizabeth Moigne, was 28. He married Margery Wadham about 1430, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He registered for military service in 1450. In 1445, his occupation is listed as treasurer of the household. He died on 25 November 1462, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton est né le 19 mai 1400, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Stourton, avait 11397 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Moigne, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Margery Wadham environ 1430, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1450. En 1445, sa profession de son indiquée est treasurer of the household. Il est décédé le 25 novembre 1462, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton am 19. Mai 1400 in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Stourton 11397 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Moigne 28. Er hat um 1430 in England Margery Wadham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er hat sich 1450 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1445 ist sein Beruf als treasurer of the household aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. November 1462 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Stourton, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton è nato il il 19 maggio 1400 nel Stourton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Stourton, aveva 11397 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Moigne, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Margery Wadham circa 1430, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1450. Nel 1445, la sua occupazione è indicata come treasurer of the household. Morì il 25 novembre 1462, nel Stourton, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Stourton 1st Baron Stourtonが1400年5月19日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンで生まれた時，父William Stourtonは11397歳，母Elizabeth Moigneは28歳であった。約1430年にイギリスでMargery Wadhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1450年に兵役登録をした。1445年，職業はtreasurer of the householdと記録されている。彼は1462年11月25日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンで62歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトチャールトン ムスグローブにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton(이)가 1400년 5월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Stourton(은)는 11397세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Moigne(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1430년 영국에서 Margery Wadham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1450년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1445년, 그의 직업은 treasurer of the household이었다. 그는 1462년 11월 25일 영국 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 찰턴 무스그로브에 묻혔다.

pt.19 May 1400–25 November 1462: 19 de maio de 1400–25 de novembro de 1462
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton nasceu em 19 de maio de 1400, em Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Stourton, tinha 11397 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Moigne, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Wadham aproximadamente 1430, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1450. Em 1445, sua profissão aparece como treasurer of the household. Ele faleceu em 25 de novembro de 1462, em Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton родился 19 мая 1400 г. в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Stourton было 11397 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Moigne, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Wadham около 1430 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1450 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1445 годуработал по профессии treasurer of the household. Он умер 25 ноября 1462 г. в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности чарлтон мусгров, сомирсет, Англия.

es.19 May 1400–25 November 1462: 19 de mayo de 1400–25 de noviembre de 1462
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Stourton 1st Baron Stourton nació el 19 de mayo de 1400, en Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Stourton, tenía 11397 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Moigne, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Margery Wadham aproximadamente 1430, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1450. En 1445, su ocupación registrada era treasurer of the household. Murió el 25 de noviembre de 1462, en Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Charlton Musgrove, Somerset, Inglaterra.
